title: Platform v1.8 completion oracle wiring
goal: Define a sanitized platform v1.8 completion oracle that can be fed by local BSP, runtime, and documentation evidence.
next_actions: Map the current platform exit criteria to concrete local probes.
Add or document one missing oracle event source.
Keep private machine topology out of oracle artifacts.
acceptance: The v1.8 platform oracle has named criteria and evidence commands.
One missing evidence gap is closed or explicitly blocked.
Swarm status names any remaining release blockers.
